data.title: 国际服活动「On your mark ＠ Millennium」
data.summary: [Event Preview] In a shocking turn of events no one could have seen coming, something has gone wrong
data.body:
[Event Preview]

In a shocking turn of events no one could have seen coming, something has gone wrong, and it's up to Sensei to help out!
So, Sensei, Noa's ready to set things right. Are you?

#BlueArchive
